reason: Mock default (no preset selected) returns {top:0,bottom:0,left:0,right:0}. Real device relay returns device-specific values — e.g. iPhone 15 Pro portrait: {top:54,bottom:34,left:0,right:0}. The mock top=0 intentionally differs from real-device top=54: per devtools#275, the SDK top value is informational (host nav bar is outside WebView viewport) and must not be applied as padding. This is the expected corrected model, not an unintentional mismatch.

Deprecated helper returns safeAreaInsets.top (mock default=0 after devtools#275 fix). Real device relay returns actual navBarHeight (e.g. 54 on iPhone 15 Pro). Same intentional mismatch as safe-area.SafeAreaInsetsGet — mock top=0 is the correct fidelity model.
First emit mirrors SafeAreaInsets.get() — same device-specific variance as safe-area.SafeAreaInsetsGet.
jsdom UA ('Mozilla/5.0 (darwin) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) jsdom/29.1.1') differs from real device WebView UA. Expected environment difference.
jsdom screen.width=0, real device returns physical screen width in CSS px.
jsdom screen.height=0, real device returns physical screen height in CSS px.
jsdom devicePixelRatio=1 (set by mock runner), real device returns hardware DPR (e.g. 3 for iPhone 15 Pro).
jsdom innerWidth=1024 (default), real device returns actual viewport width.
jsdom innerHeight=768 (default), real device returns actual viewport height.
jsdom navigator.language='en-US' by default, real device returns device locale (e.g. 'ko-KR').
Mock returns a randomly-generated mock device ID ('mock-device-<random>'). Real device relay returns a real stable device identifier.
Mock returns '/' (jsdom location.pathname). Real device relay returns the actual mini-app scheme URI.
Both return '<timestamp>' sentinel (normalized in probe). Exact numeric values differ by definition.
Mock returns mock brand defaults (displayName='Mock App'). Real device returns actual app brand values.
Mock returns 'mock-deployment-id'. Real device returns the actual deploymentId.
Mock returns 'mock-group-id'. Real device returns the actual group ID.
Mock returns empty string (default mock clipboard). Real device relay returns actual clipboard content (typically empty or last copied text).
Mock state includes pending orders by default for testing (returns Array with items). Real device relay will typically return empty array (no pending orders).
Mock state includes completed orders by default for testing (returns Array with items). Real device relay will typically return empty array.
Mock state includes a default game profile ({statusCode:'SUCCESS', nickname:'MockPlayer'}). Real device relay returns actual game center profile or null.
Mock returns {type:'HASH', hasHash:true} (mock state has userKeyHash). Real device may return undefined (not logged in) or a real hash.
Mock returns {type:'HASH', hasHash:true} (mock state has anonymousKeyHash). Real device returns actual anonymous key or undefined.
